source: User approved removing remaining large-doc warnings to make CodeWiki health green.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Fresh validation is preferred; policy may require it for high-risk semantic gates.

summary: Accepted TASK-092 large-doc warning cleanup for builds and roadmap system docs.

diff_table.current_state: .codewiki/kb/system/builds.md and .codewiki/kb/system/roadmap.md exceed live-doc lint warning threshold.
diff_table.desired_state: Condense both docs below warning threshold while preserving build lifecycle, traceability, task-boundary, sprint, retention, closure, and generated-view semantics.
diff_table.rationale: Full green CodeWiki health should not require agents to ignore oversized doc warnings.
diff_table.risk: Low: doc-only consolidation can accidentally remove policy nuance if too aggressive.

accepted_decisions.summary: Trim oversized system docs without changing semantics.
